calendar.matters:
Petition For Instructions To Ascertain Beneficiaries, Terminate Trusts, And For An Order Conveying Title
Off Calendar Aug-17-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Chad Dorr, via ZOOM, for Suzanne Beach and John McGovern, Petitioners.

The court begins by confirming with counsel that he submitted a revised proposed order to the assigned Examiner. The court then confirms that all parties agree to sell the real property.

The Petition for Instructions to Ascertain Beneficiaries, etc., is submitted.

Judge: Hon. Mary Wiss. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: B. Tso. Not reported.
